title: Structured Outputs now support recursive schemas
raw_changelog: Structured Outputs JSON schema now supports recursive type definitions.
before_text:
## Structured Outputs

### Limitations
- Maximum schema depth: 5 levels
- No recursive types
- No `$ref` to self
- Maximum 100 properties per schema
after_text:
## Structured Outputs

### Limitations
- Maximum schema depth: 10 levels
- Recursive types supported (max depth: 5 recursions)
- `$ref` to self allowed with recursion limit
- Maximum 200 properties per schema
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@
 ### Limitations
-- Maximum schema depth: 5 levels
-- No recursive types
-- No `$ref` to self
-- Maximum 100 properties per schema
+- Maximum schema depth: 10 levels
+- Recursive types supported (max depth: 5 recursions)
+- `$ref` to self allowed with recursion limit
+- Maximum 200 properties per schema

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. Structured Outputs now support more complex schemas.
